meta.title: SKILLA-V2
meta.description: Low-resolution IRG variant of Skilla. Initial flow, HTML, styles, and content inherited from skilla/release.

projects.title: jsmii Foundation Game
projects.description: Foundation project used to configure and export standalone jsmii games.

projects.title: SKILLA-V2
projects.description: Low-resolution IRG variant of Skilla. Initial flow, HTML, styles, and content inherited from skilla/release.

assetStrategy.notes: Previous foundation/skilla donor assets were removed from this project. Re-export optimized level assets and music into the SKILLA-V2 asset folders.

content.headline: Welcome
content.body: Introduce the game promise and prepare the player for the first action.

content.headline: Ready
content.body: Use this screen for countdowns, instructions, or sponsor copy immediately before gameplay.

content.headline: Level
content.body: Playable runtime scene. Content is composed from game systems, scene layers, physics, and interface elements.

content.headline: Level 2
content.body: Playable runtime scene. Content is composed from game systems, scene layers, physics, and interface elements.

content.headline: Level 3
content.body: Playable runtime scene. Content is composed from game systems, scene layers, physics, and interface elements.

content.headline: Stay in touch
content.body: Collect the lead data needed by the campaign and keep consent explicit.

content.headline: Thank you
content.body: Confirm the submitted action and provide restart or close routes.

roles.label: Character Sprites
roles.notes: Sprite sheets or vector bases used by character actions.

roles.label: Background Layers
roles.notes: Multiplane layer artwork, backdrops, skies, terrains, and scenographic planes.

roles.label: UI Elements
roles.notes: Buttons, frames, badges, icons, HUD decorations, and form visuals.

roles.label: Theme Music
roles.notes: Longer soundtrack loops or scene music. Prefer compressed delivery formats.

roles.label: Sound FX
roles.notes: Short event sounds. WAV can remain useful for critical low-latency effects.

roles.label: Presentation
roles.notes: Campaign or lead-generation visuals that are not part of gameplay.

roles.label: Spawn Objects
roles.notes: Runner obstacles, hollows, bonuses, hazards, platforms, and their optional metadata sidecars.

roles.label: Bonus Text Lists
roles.notes: Plain text or CSV word lists used by text-bonus pickups.

obstacle.notes: Solid objects that collide with the character without changing the floor strip.

hollow.notes: Floor interruptions generated into the terrain frame before collision checks.

bonus.notes: Collectibles, score multipliers, and positive feedback pickups.

hazard.notes: Damaging objects that do not necessarily block movement.

platform.notes: Special walkable or landing surfaces separate from the base terrain.

arcade infinite run.soundBindingPolicy: SFX live in audio.sfx; character actions reference them through action.soundId.
